calendar.matters:
Osc For Change Of Name For A Minor. Re: Katja Soderberg.
Off Calendar Oct-04-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Petitioners: Jimmy Stambrandt and Clare Hebert, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Katja Soberberg, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Katja Stambrandt.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-29-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Jimmy Soderberg, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Katja Soderberg, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Lacks the Minor's Mother consent, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Oct. 4, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
As to the Petitioner: Jimmy Soderbert, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jimmy Stambrandt.
Decree signed in open court.
